validations.message: You need Owner or User Access Administrator on this subscription to grant access.

options.text: This grants BlobShip the **Storage Blob Data Contributor** role on the single storage account you choose — nothing else. No subscription-wide access, no account keys. Revoke anytime by deleting the role assignment.

elements.name: storageAccount
elements.label: Storage account
elements.toolTip: The storage account BlobShip will broker uploads into.

elements.name: container
elements.label: Limit to one container (optional)
elements.toolTip: Leave blank to grant on the whole account, or name a single container to scope the grant even tighter.

constraints.validationMessage: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens; 3–63 chars. Leave blank for the whole account.
